Package util

package util
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AmountRenderer
    Table cell renderer for the Amount column in the expense history table.
    AppColors
    Centralised colour palette for the Mizan dark theme.
    CategoryPillRenderer
    Table cell renderer that draws category names as rounded pill badges, with a consistent colour assigned to each category by index.
    DefaultDarkRenderer
    Default table cell renderer for text columns in the dark-themed expense table.
    GaugePanel
    Custom painted panel that renders a circular arc gauge showing today's spending progress against the daily limit.
    UIFactory
    Factory class that creates pre-styled Swing components consistent with the Mizan dark theme.
